Requirement: Vetting should not be triggered automatically based on a status. There is a cost and we may need to delay checks. Need a 'Start Vetting' button to trigger manually at any point in the process.
What Was Done: Start Vetting button available on all workflow stages and on the candidate profile page. Vetting is manual-only — no automatic triggers.

Requirement: Split vetting into two manual triggers: 'Start Referencing' (pushes out refs based on associate portal data — free) and 'Start Full Vetting' (triggers API/Verifile checks and refs if not already started — paid).
What Was Done: Two buttons added to all workflow cards and candidate profile: 'Start Referencing' (blue, references + employment history only) and 'Start Full Vetting' (orange, all 12 checks + Verifile API). New /api/vetting/trigger-referencing route created.

Requirement: Sometimes associates do not want us to ask for their current reference until they resign. Need something to allow all refs apart from that one to go if requested by the associate. A question about this in the associate portal will be needed.
What Was Done: Added 'Are you happy for us to contact your current employer for a reference? Yes/No' question to associate portal registration form. Stored on Candidate model. When Start Referencing is triggered, current employer reference is auto-held if associate said No. Shown as green/red badge on staff profile.

Requirement: Card should move to Ready to Contract when vetting is complete. Need an element of checking (QC) before vetting is considered complete — all checks must be QC'd/signed off before someone is fine to contract.
What Was Done: QC workflow already built: Submit for QC -> QC Approve (status becomes QC COMPLETE) or QC Reject (goes back). Vetting gate requires ALL 12 checks to be COMPLETE, N/A, REFERRAL APPROVED, or QC COMPLETE before allowing move to Ready to Contract.

Requirement: Need manual override/waiver to start people with some checks still in progress.
What Was Done: Force-move override added. When vetting is incomplete and user tries to move past Ready to Contract, a confirm dialog appears: 'Vetting incomplete: X/12 checks done. Override to proceed?' Override is logged to AuditLog (event_type: compliance) and Candidate Activity Feed.

Requirement: Some tiles at top of page (Associates Offered, Vetting Complete etc.) do not work as expected. E.G. 1 Accepted candidate under Stellantis > DCA Redress. Dashboard shows 0 Associates Offered.
What Was Done: Fixed offer_stages list in dashboard query — was using wrong Application.status strings (e.g. 'Offer' instead of 'Offered', missing 'Accepted'). Also fixed Vetting Completed query with same issue.

Requirement: Associates offered button — clicking this takes users to the full Workflow page. Would be good if it can auto apply the relevant filter or focussing so that only candidates in Offered or Accepted are shown.
What Was Done: Added focus_stage query param to workflow route. Dashboard tile links to /workflow?stage=offered which auto-focuses the kanban on Offered + Accepted columns only.

Requirement: View Public Listing button on Open jobs > SERVER ERROR.
What Was Done: Fixed by moving render_template inside the SQLAlchemy session block. The job object was becoming detached and lazy-loaded relationships (e.g. job.engagement) caused DetachedInstanceError.

Requirement: Remove Revenue Forecast from Dashboard.
What Was Done: Deleted the Revenue Forecast calculation block from app.py and the HTML section from dashboard.html.

Requirement: Would prefer horizontal scroll to start at the edge of the left-hand navigation menu so that this menu is always static.
What Was Done: Changed sidebar from position:sticky to position:fixed. Added margin-left to main content area so page scroll starts to the right of the fixed nav. Sidebar always stays visible.

Requirement: Placed/Contract sent — candidates in these stages now have a link to Placements. This navigates to the full placement page. Would be good if it can instead navigate to their individual placement or at least apply a filter.
What Was Done: Placement links on Contract Sent and Placed cards now link to /placements?name=<candidate_name> to filter to that specific candidate's placement.

Requirement: Can we remove the large number tiles from the top of the verticals. The column headers already give the headline number.
What Was Done: Deleted the .stage-summary section from workflow page. Column headers retain the count badge.

Requirement: Focus mode is great but could the verticals be unticked by default.
What Was Done: Removed the 'checked' attribute from focus checkboxes. All columns now unchecked by default.

Requirement: Skip to button > Any stage > SERVER ERROR.
What Was Done: Fixed two issues: (1) decorator order on skip/unskip routes, (2) Application.notes attribute doesn't exist — changed to log skip as CandidateNote with note_type='activity' instead.

Requirement: Start vetting button only appears from Accepted. Need this to be available at all stages.
Client Response / Clarification: Automated vetting should be triggered at Accepted if not already pushed manually. That way we will not be paying for checks before commitment.
What Was Done: Start Vetting (now split into Start Referencing + Start Full Vetting) available at all stages. Auto-trigger at Accepted was built then removed per VET-001 — vetting is manual only.

Requirement: Owner Filter > SERVER ERROR.
What Was Done: Fixed: Engagement.owner_id doesn't exist (model only has Engagement.owner as String). Used Engagement.owner string match instead. Also aliased User join to avoid SQLAlchemy ambiguity.

Requirement: Can we make email and phone links on candidate cards interactive links.
What Was Done: Changed to mailto: and tel: links with event.stopPropagation() to prevent card drag interference.

Requirement: As the number of opportunities and engagements grow we can see this page getting cluttered. Can we have separate pages for Pipeline (for Pipeline/Opportunities) and Projects (for Engagements).
Client Response / Clarification: Yes. We did have it as a single page in the wireframe so apologies for changing the brief. On reflection splitting these across two pages will offer a better user experience.
What Was Done: Created new /pipeline route and page for Opportunities/Kanban. Projects page now shows engagements only. Added Pipeline nav link to sidebar. Both pages share same template with view_mode conditional rendering.

Requirement: Can all date fields be in calendar date picker format. Date fields at Opportunities are free text.
What Was Done: Changed opportunity date field from free text (DD-MM-YYYY) to HTML5 date input. Updated both create and edit routes to parse ISO format with DD-MM-YYYY fallback.

Requirement: When setting an Engagement plan there is now the option to auto-create jobs. However there is no ability to input a job spec. You can also only select from the roles that already exist in the system. Do role profiles need to be created first in Configuration or could this be done as part of editing the engagement plan?
Client Response / Clarification: My preference would be to have the role configuration built into the engagement itself. That way when we are setting up or amending an engagement plan everything is in one place. We may end up needing different job specs for the same role across different engagements.
What Was Done: Added '+ Create new role' option to role dropdown in engagement plan. New roles auto-created in TaxonomyCategory on save. Job Templates section added to Configuration page for default descriptions per role category. Auto-created jobs pull template description if one exists.

Requirement: On a test engagement (BiFD Programme > BMW) four roles have been set up in the plan. However only two of these (Team Leader and Case Handler) show on the Delivery Plan by Role table and in the figures on the Delivery Plan Summary tiles.
What Was Done: Fixed planned_by_role dict — was only accepting roles in hardcoded ROLE_TYPES list. Now accepts any role from the engagement plan. Also changed display_roles to be driven by plan data (latest version) not applicant activity.

Requirement: Once an engagement plan is created the bottom module shows Active Job posts which are the roles created in the plan. This module contains a '+New Job' button. Clicking this does not allow users to create a new job but rather navigates to a Current Opportunities page.
Client Response / Clarification: Happy to remove this button altogether and edit the plan when we need to add new roles.
What Was Done: Deleted the +New Job button from Active Job Posts module. Added per-role 'Create Job Post' button in the Delivery Plan by Role table instead (only shows when no job exists for that role).

Requirement: Delivery Plan by Role table — bug with start and end date filters. Do not filter correctly.
What Was Done: Added ISO dates to intake sub-rows (data-intake-date-iso). Implemented actual date range comparison in filterDeliveryPlan() JS — was previously a no-op.

Requirement: Will Placement list grow indefinitely or be split across multiple pages and show in groups of say 20 50 etc.?
Client Response / Clarification: Show 25 placements by default then have an item which allows users to view more i.e. 50 per page 100 per page 150 per page. As we have an Export CSV function it would also be good to have a 'Select all' option so you can export placement details across all pages based on the filters applied.
What Was Done: Pagination added: default 25 per page with 50/100/150 options and page navigation. Export CSV 'Select all' across pages not yet implemented.

Requirement: Two different views/formats for Associate profile: 1) From Resource Pool/Workflow card 2) From View Job (in workflow) > Open. Only the second view has the Interview Vetting and Placement sections.
Client Response / Clarification: Correct. Can we also include the green workflow status box from the other Profile banner.
What Was Done: Unified profile: added Interview, Vetting Checks (with inline save forms), and Contract/Placement sections to candidate_profile.html. Green status pill badge added next to candidate name showing current status with colour coding.

Requirement: Duplication between General Notes and Activity Feed. Workflow changes should be recorded in Activity feed. General notes should just be for user-added notes. Notes being searchable would be ideal.
What Was Done: General Notes now filtered to note_type='note' only (user-added). Activity Feed shows only auto-logged workflow changes (note_type='activity'). Search input added to General Notes section.

Requirement: Issue Contact — does not appear to do anything. Can the fields in this section be pre-populated with the data that exists on the Engagement Role and locked down for anyone without admin rights.
What Was Done: Contract form pre-populates dates from engagement, pay rate from plan, role title from job. Fields locked as readonly for non-admin users.

Requirement: Unclear how to create an Active Placement for associate.
What Was Done: Added 'Issue Contract' button to Contract card on candidate profile. Placements guidance text: 'Placements are created automatically when a contract is signed.' Contract card shows engagement/role context with selectable dropdowns and mismatch warning.

Requirement: From Associate profile > Back to Applications button > SERVER ERROR.
What Was Done: Fixed by moving render_template inside SQLAlchemy session to prevent DetachedInstanceError on lazy-loaded relationships.

Requirement: Need a clear flag to show Vetting Complete for candidate.
Client Response / Clarification: That is fine on individual records. Once vetting is complete the candidate card in the workflow will automatically move to Ready to Contract so that can be our visual cue there. Perhaps we could also have a Vetting Complete count tile in the Delivery Plan summary visual of the engagement.
What Was Done: Vetting Complete tile added as 5th tile in Delivery Plan Summary on engagement dashboard. Counts candidates with all 12 checks complete. Grid updated to 5 columns. Auto-move to Ready to Contract already in place when all checks complete.

Requirement: Add Associate button > no field to upload CV.
What Was Done: Added enctype='multipart/form-data' and CV file input (PDF/DOC/DOCX) to the Add Associate modal form in resource_pool.html.

Requirement: Vetting items marked as complete do not save. When you click save system reverts to different view of Associate profile and vetting items are no longer visible.
What Was Done: Fixed vetting save redirect — both update_vetting_check and manual_vetting_entry routes now redirect back to request.referrer instead of always going to candidate_profile. User stays on the same page after saving.

Requirement: Cannot progress candidate card through the grid from Accepted to Ready to Contract as message shows vetting items incomplete.
What Was Done: Added QC COMPLETE to all vetting completion checks for consistency (5 locations). Combined with VET-006 fix (saves now persist correctly) the progression works when all checks are genuinely complete. Vetting gate now also covers Contract Sent and Placed stages.
